title: DeepDance 3D
description: A real-time 3D pose estimation tool built to analyze House Dance footing and rhythm using PyTorch and OpenCV.

title: CloudRender.js
description: A WebGL-based point cloud visualization tool that can render millions of points directly in the browser.

title: Autonomous Drone Nav
description: Simulation environment for testing autonomous drone navigation algorithms using deep reinforcement learning.

title: Portfolio v2
description: This very website! A scalable, completely static architecture driven by JSON data and Framer Motion for a premium feel.

title: RhythmSync API
description: A backend service deployed horizontally serving ML models that align audio beats to video frames.

title: Syntax Checker
description: One of my earliest projects: a simple C++ syntax linter built from scratch to understand parsers.
